form.formComment: Won two starts back over 352m at this track. Last start he finished 5th on April 1 over 352m at this track behind Expelled beaten 4.5 lengths (20.31) in a Grade 4. Draw likely to suit. Broke a four-start winning streak when fifth last time. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 2.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability and worth including among the chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 352m in 19.64. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 352m at this track at Grade 5 level. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when sixth (20.42) at this track. Has ability but this tough and looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.60) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing seventh and beaten 13 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 11 starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing three wins on end after scoring over 352m at this track in 19.72 last time, set up by a fast early sectional. In form and can make it three straight.
